name: nepal-tourism-db-seeder
description: Database seeding script for Nepal Digital Tourism Infrastructure

scripts.seed:all: npm run seed && npm run seed:content
scripts.setup:temp-admin: echo '📋 Copy and run in Supabase SQL Editor:' && cat scripts/create-temp-admin.sql
scripts.copy-part1: cat scripts/part1-basic-tables.sql | pbcopy && echo '📋 Part 1 schema copied to clipboard!'
scripts.copy-part2: cat scripts/part2-content-tables.sql | pbcopy && echo '📋 Part 2 schema copied to clipboard!'
scripts.copy-temp-admin: cat scripts/create-temp-admin.sql | pbcopy && echo '📋 Temp admin SQL copied to clipboard!'

author: Nepal Digital Tourism Infrastructure Team
